message:
fix(ci): Windows path fixes in ext_entry_scan and auto_repair_integration

- ext_entry_scan: normalize backslashes to forward slashes in relative
  paths so source_tier classification and assertion checks work on Windows
- extension_auto_repair_integration: strip UNC prefix from temp dir cwd
  before passing to JS runtime, preventing \\?\ prefix from corrupting
  readFileSync path resolution

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
